title: Senior Software Engineer - Urban Company Digital Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Urban Company Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Company Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Urban Company Digital Technologies:
Urban Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company Digital Technologies!
